name: getSpecialists
description: Runs multiple specialist AI workers in parallel. Each specialist operates in its own isolated AI context with a dedicated tool set. All specialists run concurrently — results are returned only after all have completed. Use this from within an orchestrator context to decompose a task into parallel work packages.

specialists.description: Array of specialist job definitions to run in parallel. Each entry defines one specialist run.

jobID.description: Sequential job number starting from 1. Used to match results back to jobs.

prompt.description: The specific task prompt for this specialist. Be precise — the specialist has no context from the orchestrator conversation.
